noReleaseFound: Could not find a suitable release
urlMatchesNoSource: URL does not match a known source
cantInstallOlderVersion: Cannot install an older version of an app
appIdMismatch: Downloaded package ID does not match existing app ID
repoRenamedCheck: Check if repository was moved (increases API calls)
repoRenamedExplanation: This repository was moved. Updating the URL keeps future updates working.
functionNotImplemented: This class has not implemented this function
githubPATLabel: GitHub personal access token (increases rate limit)
filterReleaseTitlesByRegEx: Filter release titles by regular expression
dropdownNoOptsError: ERROR: DROPDOWN MUST HAVE AT LEAST ONE OPT
trackOnlyAppDescription: The app will be tracked for updates, but ReObtain will not be able to download or install it.
xWillBeRemovedButRemainInstalled: {} will be removed from ReObtain but remain installed on device.
resetInstallStatusForSelectedAppsQuestio: Reset install status for selected apps?
installStatusOfXWillBeResetExplanation:
The install status of any selected apps will be reset.

This can help when the app version shown in ReObtain is incorrect due to failed updates or other issues.
customLinkMessage: These links work on devices with ReObtain installed
shareAppConfigLinks: Share app configuration as HTML link
author: Author
importedAppsIdDisclaimer:
Imported apps may incorrectly show as "not installed".
To fix this, re-install them through ReObtain.
This should not affect app data.

Only affects URL and third-party import methods.
followSystemThemeExplanation: Following system theme is possible only by using third-party applications
showWebInAppView: Show source webpage in app view
pinUpdates: Pin updates to top of apps view
deviceSupportsXArch: Your device supports the {} CPU architecture.
deviceSupportsFollowingArchs: Your device supports the following CPU architectures:
sourceIsXButPackageFromYPrompt: The app source is '{}' but the release package comes from '{}'. Continue?
updatesAvailableNotifDescription: Notifies the user that updates are available for one or more apps tracked by ReObtain
appsUpdatedNotifDescription: Notifies the user that updates to one or more apps were applied in the background
errorCheckingUpdatesNotifDescription: A notification that shows when background update checking fails
appsRemovedNotifDescription: Notifies the user that one or more apps were removed due to errors while loading them
xWasRemovedDueToErrorY: {} was removed due to this error: {}
obtainiumMustBeOpenToInstallApps: ReObtain must be open to install apps
completeAppInstallationNotifDescription: Asks the user to return to ReObtain to finish installing an app
checkingForUpdatesNotifDescription: Transient notification that appears when checking for updates
pleaseAllowInstallPerm: Please allow ReObtain to install apps
versionCorrectionDisabled: Version correction disabled (plugin doesn't seem to work)
appWithIdOrNameNotFound: No app was found with that ID or name
noVersionDetectionExplanation: This option should only be used for apps where version detection does not work correctly.
downloadNotifDescription: Notifies the user of the progress in downloading an app
categoryDeleteWarning: All apps in deleted categories will be set to uncategorized.
label: Label
selectedCategorizeWarning: This will replace any existing category settings for the selected apps.
onlyWorksWithNonVersionDetectApps: Only works for apps with version detection disabled.
releaseDateAsVersion: Use release date as version string
releaseTitleAsVersion: Use release title as version string
extractVersionFromAssetName: Extract version string from asset name
releaseDateAsVersionExplanation: This option should only be used for apps where version detection does not work correctly, but a release date is available.
versionDetectionExplanation: Reconcile version string with version detected from OS
autoApkFilterByArch: Attempt to filter APKs by CPU architecture if possible
autoLinkFilterByArch: Attempt to filter links by CPU architecture if possible
moveNonInstalledAppsToBottom: Move non-installed apps to bottom of apps view
tryInferAppIdFromCode: Try inferring app ID from source code
checkUpdateOnDetailPage: Check for updates on opening app detail page
addInfoInSettings: Add this info in the Settings.
githubSourceNote: GitHub rate limiting can be avoided using an API key.
sortByLastLinkSegment: Sort by only the last segment of the link
filterReleaseNotesByRegEx: Filter release notes by regular expression
customLinkFilterRegex: Custom APK link filter by regular expression (default '.apk$')
appsPossiblyUpdatedNotifDescription: Notifies the user that updates to one or more apps were potentially applied in the background
backgroundUpdateReqsExplanation: Background updates may not be possible for all apps.
backgroundUpdateLimitsExplanation: The success of a background install can only be determined when ReObtain is opened.
intermediateLinkRegex: Filter for an 'intermediate' link to visit
bgUpdatesOnWiFiOnly: Disable background updates when not on Wi-Fi
bgUpdatesWhileChargingOnly: Disable background updates when not charging
matchGroupToUse: Match group to use for version string extraction RegEx
versionExtractWholePage: Apply version string extraction Regex to entire page
onlyCheckInstalledOrTrackOnlyApps: Only check installed and track-only apps for updates
useShizuku: Use Dhizuku, Shizuku or Sui to install
shizukuBinderNotFound: Dhizuku or Shizuku services are not running
shizukuOldAndroidWithADB: Shizuku running on Android < 8.1 with ADB - update Android or use Dhizuku or Sui instead
shizukuPretendToBeGooglePlay: Set Google Play as the installation source (if Shizuku is used)
useVersionCodeAsOSVersion: Use app versionCode as OS-detected version
useLatestAssetDateAsReleaseDate: Use latest asset upload as release date
selfHostedNote: The "{}" dropdown can be used to reach self-hosted/custom instances of any source.
badDownload: The APK could not be parsed (incompatible or partial download)
appVerifierInstructionToast: Share to AppVerifier, then return here when ready.
crowdsourcedConfigsLabel: Crowdsourced app configurations (use at your own risk)
name: Name
documentationLinksNote: The ReObtain GitHub page linked below contains links to videos, articles, discussions, and other resources that will help you understand how to use the app.
batteryOptimizationNote: Note that background downloads may work more reliably if you switch to the "foreground service" in the ReObtain settings and/or disable battery optimization for ReObtain in your OS settings.
fileDeletionError: Failed to delete file (try deleting it manually then try again): "{}"
foregroundServiceExplanation: Foreground service for update checking (more reliable, consumes more power)
fgServiceNotice: This notification is required for background update checking (it can be hidden in the OS settings)
googleVerificationWarningP1:
Google has announced that, starting in 2026/2027, all apps on "certified" Android devices will require the developer to submit personal identity details directly to Google.

Since the developers of this app do not agree to this requirement, ReObtain will no longer work on certified Android devices after that time.
googleVerificationWarningP2: Go to https://keepandroidopen.org/ for more information.
googleVerificationWarningP3:
Note that in the short term, it may continue to be possible to install "unverified" (non-compliant) apps through an "advanced flow" process that Google has promised to implement after broad backlash to their announcement, but they have not detailed how this would work so it is unclear whether it will truly preserve user freedoms in any practical way.

In any case, Google's move is a significant step towards the end of free, general-purpose computing for individuals.

Non-certified OSes, like GrapheneOS, should be unaffected by this for as long as they are allowed to continue to exist.

tooManyRequestsTryAgainInMinutes.one: Too many requests (rate limited) - try again in {} minute
tooManyRequestsTryAgainInMinutes.other: Too many requests (rate limited) - try again in {} minutes

bgUpdateGotErrorRetryInMinutes.one: BG update checking encountered a {}, will schedule a retry check in {} minute
bgUpdateGotErrorRetryInMinutes.other: BG update checking encountered a {}, will schedule a retry check in {} minutes

bgCheckFoundUpdatesWillNotifyIfNeeded.one: BG update checking found {} update - will notify user if needed
bgCheckFoundUpdatesWillNotifyIfNeeded.other: BG update checking found {} updates - will notify user if needed

xAndNMoreUpdatesFailed.one: Failed to update {} and 1 more app.
xAndNMoreUpdatesFailed.other: Failed to update {} and {} more apps.

xAndNMoreUpdatesPossiblyInstalled.one: {} and 1 more app may have been updated.
xAndNMoreUpdatesPossiblyInstalled.other: {} and {} more apps may have been updated.

trackOnlyUndeterminedInstalledVersion: Installed version unknown (app may be missing, or package ID may not match).
trackOnlyTempPackageIdInstalledVersion: Installed version unknown: this entry uses a temporary package ID, so the device cannot be queried. Re-add with package ID detection on, or set the real package ID.
fixPackageIdExplanation: Enter the app's correct package ID (e.g. com.vendor.app). ReObtain will look up the installed version on this device again.
invalidAndroidPackageId: Not a valid app package ID
onDemandOnlyDescription: Hide from the main apps list. Update checks run only when you pull to refresh on the On-Demand Only screen or on this app's detail page.
onDemandOnlyEmpty: No on-demand apps. Enable On-Demand Only in Additional Options for an app.
appEditsUnsavedBody: You have unsaved edits. If you leave now, they will be lost.
configExportFolderDescription: Where ReObtain exports your backup JSON.
settingsCustomSeedRemoveMessage: This removes the color from your saved list. You can add it again later.
settingsCustomSeedRowHint: Long-press a saved color to remove it
progressiveEdgeFadeSubtitle: Softens content under transparent headers (similar to FilePipe).
settingsMaterialYouHint: Material You needs Android 12 or newer. On this device, accent falls back to the default seed.
settingsGradientDisabledInBlackTheme: Can not enable in black theme
settingsProgressiveBlurSubtitle: May reduce frame rate on older devices.
settingsReduceVisualEffectsSubtitle: Disables blur and some animations for smoother performance on weaker hardware.
matchAppPageToIconColors: Match app page to icon colors
regexAssistTooltip: Suggest a RegEx from a raw string
versionRegexAssistTooltip: Suggest RegEx from raw version string
versionRegexAssistRawHint: Text from the source before RegEx trimming (saved when this app was last refreshed). You can paste a different string if needed.
versionRegexAssistPickLabel: Pick the part to keep as the displayed latest version
versionRegexAssistCustomLabel: Or type the exact substring to keep
versionRegexAssistCustomHint: Must appear exactly inside the raw string above
versionRegexAssistNeedRaw: Enter or paste the raw version string first.
versionRegexAssistPickOrType: Select a suggestion or type the substring to keep.
versionRegexAssistCouldNotBuild: Could not build a RegEx for that choice. Adjust the raw text or pick another substring.
filterRegexAssistRawHintApk: APK name or label from the source before the APK filter is applied (saved when this app was last refreshed). You can paste a different string if needed.
filterRegexAssistRawHintRelease: Release title from the source before the title filter is applied (saved when this app was last refreshed). You can paste a different string if needed.
filterRegexAssistRawHintVersion: Version name from the source before the version filter is applied (saved when this app was last refreshed). You can paste a different string if needed.
filterRegexAssistPickLabelApk: Pick the part of the name the filter should match
filterRegexAssistPickLabelRelease: Pick the part of the title the filter should match
filterRegexAssistPickLabelVersion: Pick the part of the version the filter should match
filterRegexAssistPickRawLineLabel: Pick a line from last refresh
appsTabViewOptionsHint: Tip: open View options on the Apps tab for quick layout controls.
groupNonInstalledSeparatelyDescription: When grouping by category or source, show apps that are not installed in their own section instead of inside each group.
groupUpdatesSeparatelyDescription: Show apps with available updates in their own 'Updates' group instead of their normal group. Works with all grouping modes.
saveDownloadedApkCopies: Save downloaded assets to the folder
apkSaveFolderDescription: Downloaded update assets (e.g. APKs) will be saved here.
apkSaveFolderCopyFailed: Could not save APK to your chosen folder
thirdPartyInstallerNotSelected: Please select a third-party installer app in Settings first
versionOrderUnclearSubtitle: The app cannot tell which build is newer. Open the source or try Update if you want this release; use Skip if you are fine staying on the current version.
uncertainUpdateTooltip: Version order unclear - open the release or try update from the app page
updateDisabledWhileVersionSkipped: Unskip this version or mark as updated to enable update
deleteBulkScanHistorySubtitle: Clears saved results only for the stores selected above. Does not remove tracked apps.
bulkScanNavigationCancelBody: Navigating away will cancel the current search and discard partial results from this screen. Use the in-page Cancel search button if you want to review partial results instead.
bulkScanCacheNote: Results are cached per app, per store. Each app is only re-fetched from a store if it wasn't scanned there before.
showFolderedAppsOnMainPage: Show foldered apps on main page
showFolderedAppsOnMainPageTooltip: When off, foldered apps are hidden from the main tab and excluded from its pull-to-refresh. Each folder can be refreshed separately.
deleteFolderConfirm:
Delete folder "{name}"?

Apps will be moved back to the main list.
